message:
Close Bedrock provider bead (bd-3uqg.3.3) and add routing metadata to canonical ID table

Issue tracking (issues.jsonl):
- bd-3uqg.3.3 "[PROVIDER-NATIVE] Implement Amazon Bedrock provider module"
  status changed from in_progress → closed with verification comment
  confirming full Provider trait impl, factory routing, SigV4 signing,
  AWS credential chain, region handling, model-ID normalization (6
  prefix/suffix variants), 6 unit tests, 4 E2E VCR smoke tests

Documentation (provider-canonical-id-table.json):
- Added routing block to amazon-bedrock entry with concrete values:
  api: bedrock-converse-stream, auth_header: false (uses SigV4 instead),
  base_url: empty (derived from region), context_window: 200000,
  max_tokens: 8192. This completes the canonical metadata for Bedrock
  so downstream tooling can auto-configure provider connections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
